footer.feature_1_desc: BookingShow applies modern international standard IMAX and 4DX cinema technology.
footer.feature_2_desc: Use AI to suggest movies and Consult ticket prices at high speed.
footer.feature_3_desc: Integrated ZaloPay, PayOS wallet for natural transaction processing.
footer.pricing_combo: Get 10% off when pre-ordering Popcorn and Soda.
footer.about_desc: The journey to the theater is not just about watching a movie, it is a complete experience.
